context: Tests whether the agent follows the complete validation workflow including documentation research, community research, hypothesis formation, and structured result documentation with required fields.

checklist.name: CFN docs lookup
checklist.description: research-findings.md references AWS CloudFormation documentation and identifies the 'Update requires' field for the Endpoint property

checklist.name: Community research
checklist.description: research-findings.md mentions searching or checking GitHub (AWS CDK repo), Stack Overflow, or AWS re:Post

checklist.name: Hypothesis stated
checklist.description: research-findings.md contains an explicit hypothesis statement about expected behavior

checklist.name: Non-prod environment
checklist.description: test-plan.md specifies using a non-production or disposable test environment

checklist.name: Resource isolation
checklist.description: test-plan.md describes creating a minimal test stack with only the SNS subscription (no unrelated resources)

checklist.name: Observable criteria
checklist.description: test-plan.md defines specific success criteria such as looking for DELETE/CREATE events vs UPDATE_IN_PLACE

checklist.name: CFN events inspection
checklist.description: test-plan.md or validation-report.md includes using 'aws cloudformation describe-stack-events' command

checklist.name: Required report fields
checklist.description: validation-report.md contains at least 5 of these fields: Date/Region/CDK Version, Resource Type & Property Changed, AWS Docs Say, What Actually Happened, CFN Events, Matches Docs, Workaround Needed

checklist.name: Behavior classification
checklist.description: validation-report.md classifies the behavior as one of: UPDATE_IN_PLACE, REPLACEMENT, NO-OP, or error

checklist.name: Workaround decision
checklist.description: validation-report.md includes explicit decision on whether a workaround is needed with reasoning
